parameters.query:
SELECT b.id AS booking_id, b.apartment_id, a.name AS apartment_name,
       a.base_price,
       to_char(b.checkin_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkin_at,
       to_char(b.checkout_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS checkout_at
FROM bookings b
JOIN apartments a ON a.id = b.apartment_id
WHERE b.status IN ('confirmed', 'booking')
  AND b.checkout_at >= CURRENT_DATE
  AND b.checkin_at <= CURRENT_DATE + INTERVAL '90 days'
ORDER BY b.apartment_id, b.checkin_at

INSERT INTO gap_windows
  (apartment_id, gap_start, gap_end, nights, previous_booking_id, next_booking_id, estimated_loss, recommendation, status)
VALUES
  ($1, $2::date, $3::date, $4, $5, $6, $7, $8, 'open')
ON CONFLICT (apartment_id, gap_start)
DO UPDATE SET
  gap_end             = EXCLUDED.gap_end,
  nights              = EXCLUDED.nights,
  previous_booking_id = EXCLUDED.previous_booking_id,
  next_booking_id     = EXCLUDED.next_booking_id,
  estimated_loss      = EXCLUDED.estimated_loss,
  recommendation      = EXCLUDED.recommendation,
  updated_at          = NOW()
WHERE gap_windows.status = 'open'
RETURNING id, apartment_id, gap_start, nights, estimated_loss
DELETE FROM gap_windows WHERE status = 'open' AND gap_start < CURRENT_DATE
